_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: mice injected with ΔBB/PID LF cells developed tumors even larger (average volume ∼450 mm³) than those injected with ΔBB cells
details: PID LF appears to have gain-of-function effects, with cells developing larger tumors (average volume ~450 mm³) than ΔBB cells alone
